opinion.h4: POGOR ET AL. v. NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 874. Decided April 28, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Reported below: 3 N.Y.2d 836, 941, 144 N.E.2d 722, 145 N. E. 2d 387.
Frank S. Hogan and Richard G. Denzer for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.

356 U.S. 341 CHAUFFEURS, TEAMSTERS & HELPERS LOCAL UNION 795 ET AL. v. NEWELL, DOING BUSINESS AS EL DORADO DAIRY. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF KANSAS. No. 847. Decided April 28, 1958.
The petition for writ of certiorari is granted and the judgment of the Supreme Court of Kansas is reversed. Thornhill v. Alabama, 310 U.S. 88, 98, Third.
